query_string: ("VP Population Health" OR "Director of Population Health" OR "Director of Care Management" OR "Director of Care Transformation") AND ("primary care" OR "ambulatory" OR "value-based") site:linkedin.com/in
industry_filter: Hospital & Health Care` (apply via LinkedIn UI after running Boolean)
expected_subtiers: 3B` — wide net across provider org types where pop health roles concentrate
cluster: OO-1` + `OO-2` (Operational Owner — population health + care transformation flavors)
why_this_slot: Highest density of operators feeling daily mental-health-in-primary-care pain. The persona that converts internally per [[COCM_OUTREACH_SEQUENCING]]. Captures 4 subtiers in one query, so a single afternoon of triage seeds 4 HeyReach campaigns.
